subject: MPI-70 status for the new MPI-64 session — v0.3.0 image set: what to wire in Step 5.1 (3 things changed vs the original plan)
body:
For whoever picked up MPI-64 from the handoff — here's the settled MPI-70 image state so you can wire Step 5.1 (card→image). Image tags are NOT green yet (build #3 in flight, link below), but the CONTRACT below is final regardless of the build result — safe to build Step 5.1 against it now. I'll send the final 'tags are live + public' ping separately once build #3 is green.

WHAT THE APP NEEDS TO KNOW (3 changes from the original MPI-70 brief):

1. TWO image tags, profile-suffixed (UNCHANGED from my first message): 
   ghcr.io/madponyinteractive/cubric-vision-pod:v0.3.0-cu124  and  :v0.3.0-cu128
   Step 5.1: turn POD_IMAGE (routes/remoteProxy.js:48) into a card→image fn: Blackwell (sm_120: 5090 / RTX PRO 6000 / B200) → -cu128; everything else (Ampere/Ada/Hopper) → -cu124. cu124 lowers the host-driver floor (cuda>=12.4) which kills the 4090-on-old-driver refusal. WRAPPER_VERSION stays 0.2.2 (wrapper.py unchanged).

2. cu128 now runs STABLE torch 2.7.1+cu128 (NOT the base's nightly 2.8). Still cu128, still Blackwell sm_120. Just so any manifest/version surface you read reflects the real runtime.

3. ACCELERATOR PLAN CHANGED (this is the big one for your warmup messaging): originally 'flash-attn baked + sage runtime'. flash-attn is now DROPPED — its prebuilt wheels are ABI-fragile (broke both builds) AND it's ~7% slower than PyTorch SDPA for diffusion AND ComfyUI bypasses it when sage is active. New stack: sageattention installed at FIRST POD BOOT onto the volume (/workspace/cubric/pylibs, ~5-15min one-time per GPU arch) + PyTorch SDPA as the always-present fallback. So:
   - Your readiness/warmup UX: first Connect on a fresh volume/arch = cold image pull THEN a one-time sage compile (~5-15 min) before ComfyUI is ready. Message it as 'optimising for your GPU (one-time)'. A GPU-arch switch re-triggers it.
   - If the sage compile ever fails, the Pod is STILL fine — ComfyUI falls back to SDPA (no hard dependency). So readiness should NOT block on sage; only on ComfyUI being up.
   - Generous readiness timeout/backstop so it doesn't abort during the sage compile (you'd flagged this already — still correct, just confirming flash-attn is no longer part of the picture).

ffmpeg IS in the image now (your earlier catch) — remote video output (VHS_VideoCombine) will work in v0.3.0.

Full detail: .agents/mpi-kanban/tasks/MPI-70/decisions.md (D1, D2-revised, build log in validation.md). Build #3: https://github.com/MadPonyInteractive/mpi-ci/actions/runs/27431905138. I'll ping again when both tags are green + the GHCR package is public.
